steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which finding most directly supports the conclusion that thermoregulation variation in the mycelium is independent of the fruited bodies.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'the temperature difference persisted even after fruited bodies were detached': The passage states exactly this — the difference persisted after detachment, proving the mycelium's thermoregulation is not caused by the fruited bodies. ✓
  • Choice B: Misstates the temperature relationship between fruiting and nonfruiting sites, contradicting passage details. ✗
  • Choice C: Introduces unmentioned details about mycelium structure not found in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D: Makes an unsupported comparison that the passage does not address. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
